overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk city plaza in heavy rain at night, transitioning from a covered interior space with digital billboards to an open-air balcony overlooking a busy street with neon-lit skyscrapers. The footage is from a video game engine featuring ray-traced reflections and dense urban detail.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered urban plaza with a glass roof overhead. A large tree stands in the center while digital billboards glow on the walls. The camera moves forward past benches where NPCs sit, with wet reflective tiles covering the ground.

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered area into an open plaza exposed to the rainy night sky. The massive Fuyutsuki Electronics building dominates the left side with bright red neon. The camera passes a man in a suit and approaches a building entrance with stairs, while vending machines glow on the right.

segments.scene_description: Moving through an upscale outdoor lounge area with white umbrellas lit by purple neon and distinctive golden bean bag chairs. The Fuyutsuki Electronics sign remains visible on the left while the camera approaches a glass railing on the right side of the plaza.

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the glass railing at the edge of the plaza, revealing a view down to the street below where cars drive on wet roads. A couple stands at the railing ahead, and the Kendachi sign becomes visible on a building to the left while the Fuyutsuki building remains prominent in the center.

segments.scene_description: At the balcony railing, the camera pans left to reveal more of the sprawling cyberpunk cityscape. The Kendachi sign becomes prominent on the left, while two NPCs lean on the railing nearby. The view encompasses multiple illuminated skyscrapers with dense neon signage reflecting off the wet surfaces in the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban atrium into a rain-drenched open plaza dominated by neon architecture. It begins beneath a glass roof in a covered plaza, gliding past a central tree and glowing digital billboards while moving over wet, reflective floor tiles. As the camera exits the sheltered area, the environment opens up to a rainy night sky and the imposing presence of the Fuyutsuki Electronics building with its bright red neon signage. The scene then shifts past a man in a suit toward a building entrance with stairs, while the glow of vending machines illuminates the right side of the frame.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an intimate, neon-lit lounge area toward an expansive overlook of a rain-slicked cyberpunk metropolis. It begins by gliding through an upscale outdoor space characterized by purple-lit white umbrellas and golden bean bag chairs, with the Fuyutsuki Electronics sign visible to the left. As the camera approaches the edge of the plaza, the scene opens up at a glass railing to reveal a bustling street below where cars navigate wet roads beneath the towering Fuyutsuki building. The perspective then shifts as the camera pans left, moving past a couple leaning on the railing to bring the prominent Kendachi sign into view. Finally, the vista expands to encompass a sprawling cityscape of illuminated skyscrapers and dense neon signage reflecting off the surfaces in the heavy rain.
